requirement_topic.en: Uzbekistan EV Policy, BYD Local Assembly, and Public Charging Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦电动车政策、比亚迪本地组装与公共充电项目
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦電動車政策、比亞迪本地組裝與公共充電項目

summary.en: Uzbekistan EV charger deployment can be shaped by national industrial policy, EV import incentives, customs and tax treatment, BYD and other Chinese-brand local assembly programmes, municipal charging plans, public procurement, parking rules, tariff structures, and project subsidies or incentives. Uzbekistan's EV market is nascent but growing; BYD has established local vehicle assembly, and EV import policy has been used to stimulate uptake. These policy measures do not replace O'zstandart product conformity assessment, but they can determine charger location, ownership model, connector type (vehicles assembled locally may use IEC 62196 inlet, not GB/T 20234), payment function, data reporting, local-language documentation, and maintenance obligations. O'zstandart conformity and Uzenergo grid-operator coordination must be confirmed regardless of EV policy incentives.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦电动汽车充电设备部署可能受国家产业政策、电动车进口激励、海关和税务待遇、比亚迪及其他中国品牌本地组装项目、市政充电规划、公共采购、停车规则、电价结构以及项目补贴或激励影响。乌兹别克斯坦电动车市场尚处于起步阶段但正在增长；比亚迪已在当地建立整车组装，电动车进口政策已被用于刺激需求。这些政策措施不能替代O'zstandart产品合格评定，但可能决定充电设备位置、所有权模式、连接器类型（本地组装车辆可能使用IEC 62196插座而非GB/T 20234）、支付功能、数据报送、本地语言文件和维护义务。无论电动车政策激励如何，O'zstandart合格评定和Uzenergo电网运营商协调均需另行确认。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦電動汽車充電設備部署可能受國家產業政策、電動車進口激勵、海關和稅務待遇、比亞迪及其他中國品牌本地組裝項目、市政充電規劃、公共採購、停車規則、電價結構以及項目補貼或激勵影響。烏茲別克斯坦電動車市場尚處於起步階段但正在增長；比亞迪已在當地建立整車組裝，電動車進口政策已被用於刺激需求。這些政策措施不能替代O'zstandart產品合格評定，但可能決定充電設備位置、所有權模式、連接器類型（本地組裝車輛可能使用IEC 62196插座而非GB/T 20234）、支付功能、資料報送、本地語言文件和維護義務。無論電動車政策激勵如何，O'zstandart合格評定和Uzenergo電網營運商協調均需另行確認。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan national EV and transport policy measures
Uzbekistan customs and tax measures for electric vehicles and related equipment where applicable
Municipal charging-infrastructure plans and public procurement specifications
Project-specific tariff, payment, data, and maintenance requirements
O'zstandart mandatory conformity requirements (required regardless of policy incentives)

summary.en: China-side EV charger evidence may include GB/T reports, CQC or other voluntary certificates, OCPP or platform evidence, payment terminal documents, cybersecurity descriptions, and operating records. These materials should be adapted to Uzbekistan procurement, language, tax, payment, and service requirements. Note that BYD vehicles assembled in Uzbekistan may use IEC 62196 connector inlets rather than GB/T 20234, so GB/T charger connector evidence alone is insufficient for the local fleet.
summary.zh: 中国侧电动汽车充电设备证据可能包括GB/T报告、CQC或其他自愿认证、OCPP或平台证据、支付终端文件、网络安全说明和运行记录。这些资料应适配乌兹别克斯坦采购、语言、税务、支付和服务要求。注意，在乌兹别克斯坦组装的比亚迪车辆可能使用IEC 62196连接器插座而非GB/T 20234，因此仅有GB/T充电设备连接器证据不足以支持本地车队。
summary.zht: 中國側電動汽車充電設備證據可能包括GB/T報告、CQC或其他自願認證、OCPP或平台證據、支付終端文件、網路安全說明和運行記錄。這些資料應適配烏茲別克斯坦採購、語言、稅務、支付和服務要求。注意，在烏茲別克斯坦組裝的比亞迪車輛可能使用IEC 62196連接器插座而非GB/T 20234，因此僅有GB/T充電設備連接器證據不足以支持本地車隊。

standards_or_laws: China charger platform, metering, and payment documentation

gap.en: Before bidding or import, confirm whether the charger is for private, fleet, public, highway, municipal, or industrial use. Confirm the connector inlet population of the Uzbekistan fleet (including locally assembled BYD and other brands). Check procurement language, tax and customs codes, metering and payment rules, local service requirements, warranty obligations, any public-network data interface, and O'zstandart conformity status.
gap.zh: 投标或进口前，应确认充电设备用于私人、车队、公共、高速、市政还是工业场景。确认乌兹别克斯坦车队插座构成（含本地组装的比亚迪和其他品牌）。核查采购语言、税务和海关编码、计量和支付规则、本地服务要求、质保义务、任何公共网络数据接口以及O'zstandart合格评定状态。
gap.zht: 投標或進口前，應確認充電設備用於私人、車隊、公共、高速、市政還是工業場景。確認烏茲別克斯坦車隊插座構成（含本地組裝的比亞迪和其他品牌）。核查採購語言、稅務和海關編碼、計量和支付規則、本地服務要求、質保義務、任何公共網路資料介面以及O'zstandart合格評定狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where an Uzbekistan law, customs measure, tax rule, public procurement, municipal permit, subsidy, tariff, or public-network requirement applies; O'zstandart conformity is always required for regulated electrical products
mandatory_status.cn: Project-specific depending on Chinese export, customs, platform, payment, and customer requirements

source.publisher: Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan EV policy and BYD local assembly activity can affect charger deployment and connector requirements, but they do not replace O'zstandart conformity, IEC 62196 connector compatibility, Uzenergo grid approval, or site permitting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦电动车政策和比亚迪本地组装活动可能影响充电设备部署和连接器要求，但不能替代O'zstandart合格评定、IEC 62196连接器兼容性、Uzenergo电网批准或站点许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克斯坦電動車政策和比亞迪本地組裝活動可能影響充電設備部署和連接器要求，但不能替代O'zstandart合格評定、IEC 62196連接器相容性、Uzenergo電網批准或站點許可。
